title: Platform worker promotion queue parallel slot
purpose: B2.6 defines platform worker promotion queue parallel slot for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B2.6` only; siblings under `B2` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: On scheduled platform turns, the conductor assigns economy-tier platform workers a single promotion queue item id from Plane D without mutating the active consumer goal scope.

Platform workers drain the assigned item—script extraction, playbook distillation, or pack fragment work—on a parallel slot while product pursuit continues on the main stack per [B4.2](B4.2-platform-promotion-queue-peek-drain.md).
Completion updates platform maturity ladders, catalog rows, and staleness nodes so downstream compose-first search sees the promoted artifact.
Platform workers return bounded summaries; only the conductor dual-writes queue completion, journal notes, and state.json promotion fields.

If a platform worker edits product goal artifacts, completes without verify proof, or blocks a product-blocked missing tool, pursuit halts at H2 and the queue item reopens rather than false-completing promotion.

Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `B2.6` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `B2.6` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `B2.6`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

narrative: B2.6 defines platform worker promotion queue parallel slot for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system on scheduled platform turns, the conductor assigns economy-tier platform workers a single promotion queue item id from plane d without mutating the active consumer goal scope, then platform workers drain the assigned item—script extraction, playbook distillation, or pack fragment work—on a parallel slot while product pursuit continues on the main stack per [b4.2](b4.2-platform-promotion-queue-peek-drain.md).
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

Platform workers drain the promotion queue in parallel slots scheduled by Plane D policy—turning repeated one-off reasoning into scripts, playbooks, and pack fragments while product pursuit continues on the main stack.

The conductor assigns economy-tier platform workers with queue item ids; they must not mutate consumer goal scope. Completion updates platform maturity ladders and reconciles staleness for downstream catalog nodes. See [B4.2](B4.2-platform-promotion-queue-peek-drain.md) for peek/drain semantics each K product steps.
